Brendon McCullum Resolute to Stay as England Coach Despite Ashes Humiliation

Dec 23, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Brendon McCullum Resolute to Stay as England Coach Despite Ashes Humiliation

Despite a crushing defeat in the ongoing Ashes series, England coach Brendon McCullum has expressed his desire to remain in charge of the national team. After England’s 3-0 deficit in the five-match series, following just 11 days of cricket, McCullum admits his future as coach is uncertain and will depend on the decisions of others involved.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Brendon McCullum Resolute to Stay as England Coach Despite Ashes Humiliation
